snapshot_binding.note: Shortage/coverage/revenue-at-risk figures are pre-NR04 planner-narrative numbers, not a live NR04 export - no live 'ops export snapshot' run exists in either repository as of this sprint. Customer/item pairings already line up with NR04's real demand rows (Horizon LNG/CPP-1000, Atlas/LCM-5000, AquaGrid/PPS-2000, Frontier Mining/MPS-4000, Catalyst Chemical/CPS-3000). See docs/SNAPSHOT_CONSUMPTION_NOTES.md.

v1a_alignment.story: Executive Signal -> Commitment -> Demand -> Shortage -> Recommendation -> Decision -> Evidence -> Operational Relationships -> Timeline -> Source Records
v1a_alignment.truth_rule: All records are NorthRiver demo records. Non-flagship rows may show honest gated investigation depth until production data supports full narratives.

records.root_cause_summary: CPP-1000 shortage is tied to machining release, quality closure, FAT readiness, shipment gating, and a customer escalation.
